race.comment: CHANCE WITH WOLVES (8) finished 4.5 lengths back in seventh over 1600m at Gatton last time out after a gutsy win two runs back. Good enough to take this out. ODIN'S MOUNT (3) finished 7 lengths away in fourth last time out over 1200m at Coffs Harbour two weeks ago. Steps up in distance today. Should be poised just off the lead and is likely to feature. HELL FOLLOWS (10) has switched yards since finishing ninth five-and-a-half weeks ago over 2000m at Gold Coast Poly. Well-placed and is among the chances. ALBANIAN BEAUTY (1) settled well back then came home powerfully to score by a neck over 1350m at this track last time out. Can feature in the finish again.
